Champion.title: Champion
Champion.Name: [color=#ffaf20]Champion[/color]
Champion.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 2 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]

Gain [color=#20ff20]+1 Speed[/color] per stack of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

[color=#ff8080]If[/color] [color=#ffff50]attack range[/color] equal to 1:
     
     [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] is [color=#ffff50]no longer reduced[/color] on step
Champion.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

FlameKnight.title: FlameKnight
FlameKnight.Name: [color=#ff7000]Flame Knight[/color]
FlameKnight.Description:
Per point of [color=#ff7050]Strength[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]two-handing[/color]:

     deal [color=#ff7000]+20% Fire[/color] damage 

On [color=#ff8030]adjacent attack[/color]:

     deal 300 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to the target

On [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]:

     apply 2 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

Gain [color=#5050ff]+30 Armor[/color] per stack of [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] on self
FlameKnight.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Shantih.title: Shantih
Shantih.Name: [color=#0060ff]Shantih[/color]
Shantih.Description:
Per point of [color=#50ff70]Dexterity[/color]:

     deal [color=#0060ff]+20% Lightning[/color] damage 

On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to the target

On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color]:

     apply 2 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself
Shantih.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

FrostKnight.title: FrostKnight
FrostKnight.Name: [color=#5080ff]Frost Knight[/color]
FrostKnight.Description:
Per point of [color=#ff7050]Strength[/color]:

     [color=#ff0000]+2 Encumbrance[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]: 

     apply 5 [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] to the attacker

On [color=#ff8030]hit[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] target has [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color]:

     deal [color=#dfaf50]Blunt[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = your Encumbrance * target Freeze stacks[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color]:

     apply 1 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
FrostKnight.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     apply 5 [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color]: 

     deal [color=#af8f50]Pierce[/color] damage in a path to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = target Freeze stacks[/color]

Samnite.title: Samnite
Samnite.Name: [color=#40a000]Samnite[/color]
Samnite.Description:
Per [color=#ffff50]empty armor slot[/color]: 

     [color=#5050ff]+200 Armor[/color]
     [color=#ff8030]+100 Hit[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]:

     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy
     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] yourself for an amount equal to your [color=#ff7050]Strength[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]
Samnite.Description_Unit:
Per [color=#ffff50]empty armor slot[/color]: 

     [color=#5050ff]+200 Armor[/color]
     [color=#ff8030]+100 Hit[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]:

     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against a random adjacent enemy
     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 10

Sahasi.title: Sahasi
Sahasi.Name: [color=#a050e0]Sahasi[/color]
Sahasi.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] / [color=#af8f50]Physical[/color] damage: 

     increase it by [color=#ffff50]3[/color] [color=#707070]*[/color] stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self
     apply 2 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]"Physical" damage is Slash, Blunt and Pierce[/color]
Sahasi.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] / [color=#af8f50]Physical[/color] damage: 

     increase it by the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on yourself
     apply 2 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]"Physical" damage is Slash, Blunt and Pierce[/color]

DeathKnight.title: DeathKnight
DeathKnight.Name: [color=#a0a000]Death Knight[/color]
DeathKnight.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ffff50]adjacent[/color] [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage:

     increase the damage by your [color=#5050ff]Armor[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]ally death[/color] / [color=#ffff50]enemy death[/color]:

     apply 10 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 50
DeathKnight.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Dianmai.title: Dianmai
Dianmai.Name: [color=#70ff00]Dianmai[/color]
Dianmai.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]bare fist[/color]:

     apply 5 [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color] to the target

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color]:

     apply 2 [color=#7f206f]Evasion[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ff8030]hit[/color]:

     deal [color=#af8f50]Pierce[/color] damage to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 10 * stacks of Evasion on self[/color]
Dianmai.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Executioner.title: Executioner
Executioner.Name: [color=#ff1010]Executioner[/color]
Executioner.Description:
Gain [color=#5050ff]bonus Armor[/color] [color=#a0a0a0]= 5 * Strength * Main-hand Weapon Size[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]adjacent attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]two-handing[/color]:

     deal 500 [color=#af8f50]Slash[/color] damage to the target
     repeat with [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage

On [color=#ffff50]killing an enemy[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 100
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against a random adjacent enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]
Executioner.Description_Unit:
[color=#5050ff]+200 Armor[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]adjacent attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]two-handing[/color]:

     deal 500 [color=#af8f50]Slash[/color] damage to the target
     deal 500 [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage to the target

On [color=#ffff50]kill[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 100

MindKnightPrestige.title: MindKnightPrestige
MindKnightPrestige.Name: [color=#ffaf30]Mind Knight[/color]
MindKnightPrestige.Description:
Per point of [color=#c050ff]Willpower[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]two-handing[/color]:
     
     [color=#ff8030]+30 Hit[/color]
     [color=#50ffff]+20 Dodge[/color]
     [color=#c0c0c0]+1% chance to block[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]:

     apply [color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Repulsion applied = your Strength[/color]
MindKnightPrestige.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage:

     deal [color=#af8f50]Pierce[/color] damage to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 5 * WIL[/color]

Pyromaniac.title: Pyromaniac
Pyromaniac.Name: [color=#ff7000]Pyromaniac[/color]
Pyromaniac.Description:
Per stack of [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] on self:

     deal [color=#ff7000]+5 Fire[/color] damage 

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself
Pyromaniac.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 300 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

Tamasa.title: Tamasa
Tamasa.Name: [color=#ff7000]Tamasa[/color]
Tamasa.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     deal [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to yourself
     double the stacks of [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] on yourself
     apply 5 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself
     deal 100 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage in a path to 2 enemies at any range
     repeat with [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage
     [color=#ff5050]remove[/color] all non-[color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] effects from yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Self-damage = stacks of Charge on self

Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase[/color]

[color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] is [color=#ffff50]no longer reduced[/color] on stand still
Tamasa.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 300 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

Exultite.title: Exultite
Exultite.Name: [color=#ff7000]Exultite[/color]
Exultite.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing damage to an ally[/color]:

     apply 2 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] / [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live: 

     apply 2 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself
     deal [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] and [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to all units in a 3 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 10 * stacks of Inflame on self[/color]
Exultite.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 300 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

Topheth.title: Topheth
Topheth.Name: [color=#ff7000]Topheth[/color]
Topheth.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]ally attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]an ally being attacked[/color]:

     perform a 500 damage [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against that ally

[color=#a0a0a0]This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]ally death[/color]:

     deal [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage to all enemies
     deal [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage to enemies = 20 * # of allies

Self-damage = 5 * # of allies[/color]
Topheth.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 300 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

Arsonist.title: Arsonist
Arsonist.Name: [color=#00a000]Arsonist[/color]
Arsonist.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     summon 10 [color=#20af20]Roots[/color]

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]: 

     summon 3 [color=#20af20]Roots[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]summon[/color]:

     deal 75 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage in a path to 1 enemy in a 4 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Roots are small stationary plants that entangle enemies

Total summons limited by your Willpower[/color]
Arsonist.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     apply 5 [color=#60af20]Entangle[/color] to all enemies in a 2 tile range
     summon 2 [color=#20af20]Briarfolk[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Briarfolk are human-shaped vines that entangle enemies[/color]

Surtmir.title: Surtmir
Surtmir.Name: [color=#5080ff]Surtmir[/color]
Surtmir.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]:

     apply 5 [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] to all enemies in a 2 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color]:

     deal [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to the target
     apply equal stacks of [color=#ff7000]Scorch[/color] to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = stacks of Scorch + Freeze on the target[/color]
Surtmir.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     apply 5 [color=#60af20]Entangle[/color] to all enemies in a 2 tile range
     summon 2 [color=#20af20]Briarfolk[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Briarfolk are human-shaped vines that entangle enemies[/color]

Hazar.title: Hazar
Hazar.Name: [color=#ffd000]Hazar[/color]
Hazar.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color] / [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]: 

     create [color=#ffd000]acid[/color] terrain in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]: 

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] yourself equal to the total stacks of [color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color] on enemies on [color=#ffd000]acid[/color] terrain 
     apply 5 [color=#ffd000]Corrosion[/color] to enemies on [color=#ffd000]acid[/color] terrain
Hazar.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]initial attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] the target has [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color]:  

     perform 3 [color=#ffff50]extra attacks[/color] against the target

On [color=#ffff50]hit[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to 3 enemies in a 3 tile range

Kashra.title: Kashra
Kashra.Name: [color=#d040a0]Kashra[/color]
Kashra.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]initial attack[/color]:

     perform 2 [color=#ff8030]extra attacks[/color] against the target

On [color=#ffff50]attack[/color]:

     [color=#ff5050]remove[/color] all non-[color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] effects from yourself
     apply 3 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]
Kashra.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]initial attack[/color]:

     remove [color=#a030b0]Stasis[/color] from yourself
     perform 2 [color=#ff8030]extra attacks[/color] against the target

On [color=#ffff50]attack[/color]:

     apply 3 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

Frenzied.title: Frenzied
Frenzied.Name: [color=#ffa000]Frenzied One[/color]
Frenzied.Description:
Gain [color=#20ff20]+1 Speed[/color] per stack of [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] on self

Deal [color=#ffff50]+5 damage[/color] per stack of [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] on self

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     double the stacks of [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] on yourself
     apply 10 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ff8030]stand still[/color] / [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]:

     deal [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] and [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Self-damage = stacks of Inflame on self

Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase[/color]
Frenzied.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]initial attack[/color]:

     remove [color=#a030b0]Stasis[/color] from yourself
     perform 2 [color=#ff8030]extra attacks[/color] against the target

On [color=#ffff50]attack[/color]:

     apply 3 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself

Gothi.title: Gothi
Gothi.Name: [color=#0060ff]Gothi[/color]
Gothi.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color]:

     deal 300 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 1 enemy in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#7f206f]Evasion[/color] to yourself
Gothi.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color]:

     deal 300 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to one enemy in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#7f206f]Evasion[/color] to yourself

Stormbringer.title: Stormbringer
Stormbringer.Name: [color=#3080ff]Stormbringer[/color]
Stormbringer.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] / [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] / [color=#78bca4]divine intervention[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     deal 100 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] and [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage to all units in a 4 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Divine intervention occurs when your deity saves you from death; must have at least one fully-charged prayer[/color]
Stormbringer.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color]:

     deal 300 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to one enemy in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#7f206f]Evasion[/color] to yourself

Alizeh.title: Alizeh
Alizeh.Name: [color=#0060ff]Alizeh[/color]
Alizeh.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color]:

     deal 25 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 2 enemies at any range
     repeat with [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] or [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself
Alizeh.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 5 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 25 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 3 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] or [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself

Bolga.title: Bolga
Bolga.Name: [color=#a0a000]Bolga[/color]
Bolga.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]killing an enemy[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range
     repeat with [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage
     apply 2 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself

Gain [color=#5050ff]+10 Armor[/color] per stack of [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] on self
Bolga.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 5 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 25 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 3 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] or [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself

Shazuza.title: Shazuza
Shazuza.Name: [color=#0060ff]Shazuza[/color]
Shazuza.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color]:

     deal [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage in a path to all enemies with [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color]
     perform a [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against all enemies with [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Lightning damage, Hit damage = 20% of your Main-hand Hit

This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type[/color]
Shazuza.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 5 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 25 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 3 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] or [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself

Samsi.title: Samsi
Samsi.Name: [color=#ffa070]Samsi[/color]
Samsi.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage:

     deal [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 10 * your Dexterity

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#ffa070]Blind[/color] to the target
Samsi.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 5 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 25 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 3 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] or [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself

Damunja.title: Damunja
Damunja.Name: [color=#0060ff]Damunja[/color]
Damunja.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage:

     apply 5 [color=#ff1010]Bleed[/color] to the target

On [color=#ff8030]hit[/color]: 

     deal 15 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to yourself
     deal [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to adjacent units and to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = stacks of Bleed on self * stacks of Bleed on the target

Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase[/color]

You [color=#ffff50]no longer take damage[/color] from any source triggered by [color=#ff1010]Bleed[/color] and it is no longer removed with [color=#c050ff]Willpower[/color]
Damunja.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 5 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 25 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 3 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] or [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself

Ormjarl.title: Ormjarl
Ormjarl.Name: [color=#0060ff]Ormjarl[/color]
Ormjarl.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     summon 3 [color=#0060ff]Blue Wyrm[/color] [color=#c050ff]familiars[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Blue Wyrms are wingless beasts that spit lightning

Summoned Familiars are not limited by your Willpower[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] all allies for 20

On [color=#ffff50]summon[/color]: 

     deal 100 [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 1 enemy at any range
Ormjarl.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 5 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal 25 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] and [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 3 enemies

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] or [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage:

     apply 1 [color=#0060ff]Charge[/color] to yourself

Angiok.title: Angiok
Angiok.Name: [color=#5080ff]Angiok[/color]
Angiok.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     apply 5 [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color]: 

     deal [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage in a path to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 10 * Willpower[/color]
Angiok.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     apply 5 [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color]: 

     deal [color=#af8f50]Pierce[/color] damage in a path to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = target Freeze stacks[/color]

IceShah.title: IceShah
IceShah.Name: [color=#5080ff]Ice Shah[/color]
IceShah.Description:
On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]: 

      summon 8 [color=#5080ff]Living Ice[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Living Ice are conscious spires of ice that project bolts of frost[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]summon[/color]: 

     create [color=#50ff90]frozen vines[/color] terrain in a 1 tile range at the summoned unit 

On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] an enemy is on [color=#50ff90]frozen vines[/color]: 

     apply 5 [color=#60af20]Entangle[/color] to the enemy unit
     deal 200 [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage to the enemy unit

On [color=#ffff50]enemy death[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] the enemy is on [color=#50ff90]frozen vines[/color]:

      summon 1 [color=#5080ff]Living Ice[/color]
IceShah.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage:  

     summon a [color=#5080ff]Living Ice[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Living Ice are conscious spires of ice that project bolts of frost[/color]

Mura.title: Mura
Mura.Name: [color=#9050ff]Mura[/color]
Mura.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     summon a [color=#9050ff]Pearl Mirror[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:
     
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against each adjacent [color=#9050ff]Pearl Mirror[/color]
     summon a [color=#9050ff]Pearl Mirror[/color]

[color=#9050ff]Pearl Mirrors[/color] are [color=#ffff50]immune[/color] to damage dealt by you

[color=#a0a0a0]Pearl Mirrors are stationary mirrors summoned from pearls and ice[/color]

On a [color=#9050ff]Pearl Mirror[/color] [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]:

     you deal [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to 1 enemy in a 4 tile range
     repeat with [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 20% of attacker's Hit, Main-hand if player[/color]
Mura.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     perform a 100 damage Main-hand [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against 2 enemies in a 5 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]hit[/color]:

     apply 1 [color=#8020a0]Meditate[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#8020a0]Meditate[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage in a path to a random enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]This hit bypasses all defense and triggers on-hit effects[/color]

Dreamer.Name: [color=#60b0ff]Dreamer[/color]
Dreamer.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     apply 5 [color=#60b0ff]Dream[/color] to yourself
     perform all of your "[color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]" actions [color=#707070]does not tick down effects[/color]

     apply 2 [color=#ff1010]Bleed[/color] and 2 [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] to the target

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#ff1010]Bleed[/color] / [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color]:

VoidMage.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage:

     increase it by 1% per stack of [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] on yourself and the target

On [color=#ffff50]kill[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#00ff00]unencumbered[/color]:

You [color=#ffff50]no longer take damage[/color] from any source triggered by [color=#5080ff]Freeze[/color] and it is no longer removed with [color=#c050ff]Willpower[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]kill[/color]:

[color=#ffff50]+3 stacks[/color] of any [color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] applied by you

     apply 7 [color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ff8030]hit[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage in a path to 3 enemies in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]hit[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to 3 enemies in a 3 tile range

Add [color=#50ff50]+20[/color] to all [color=#50ff50]healing[/color]

     apply 5 [color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] to yourself per stack of [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color] on the dying unit
Vengati.Description_Unit:

     deal 100 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to 3 enemies in a 3 tile range

Plaguemancer.Description:
You become immune to applications of [color=#80af00]Plague[/color]

     apply 1 [color=#80af00]Plague[/color] to the target

On [color=#ffff50]enemy death[/color]:

     apply 2 [color=#80af00]Plague[/color] to all enemies
Plaguemancer.Description_Unit:

On [color=#ffff50]hit[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to 3 enemies in a 3 tile range

Doomsayer.title: Doomsayer
Doomsayer.Name: [color=#a0a000]Doomsayer[/color]
Doomsayer.Description:
Enemies can no longer remove [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] from themselves

     apply 15 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]enemy death[/color]:

     apply [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to 1 enemy at any range equal to the stacks of [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] on the dying unit

On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]:

     apply 20 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

     summon 10 [color=#50a000]Crawlers[/color]

     summon 2 [color=#50a000]Crawlers[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Crawlers are writhing worms with a doom-laden bite[/color]

     [color=#50ff50]+5 Speed[/color]

Acolyte.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]: 

     grant 1 charge to each known [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]ally death[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] enemies live:

     deal [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Self-damage = your Willpower

Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase[/color]

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = Main-hand Hit[/color]
Acolyte.Description_Unit:

On [color=#ffff50]damaging an ally[/color]:

     apply 5 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to 1 enemy at any range

Allies gain [color=#ff8030]+50 Hit[/color] and [color=#ffff50]90%[/color] [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] / [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] resistance

On [color=#ffff50]damaging an ally[/color] :

     apply 5 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to an enemy
     deal 100 [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage to the closest enemy

EarthMage.Name: [color=#00a000]Briar Mage[/color]
EarthMage.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     summon 2 [color=#20af20]Briarfolk[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Briarfolk are human-shaped plants that entangle enemies[/color]

     apply 5 [color=#60af20]Entangle[/color] to 3 enemies at any range

Increase all [color=#af8f50]Physical[/color] / [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage by the stacks of [color=#60af20]Entangle[/color] on the target [color=#707070]* 10[/color]

Gliva.Description:
Your summoned allies are replaced with [color=#30f000]Mushrooms[/color] [color=#707070]inherit 20% of your max Life, doesn't work on Cadavers / Familiars[/color]

On a [color=#30f000]Mushroom[/color] [color=#ffff50]being attacked[/color]:

     you deal [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage to the attacker

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = Willpower * # of Mushrooms[/color]

     summon a [color=#30f000]Mushroom[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] enemies live:

[color=#a0a0a0]Mushrooms are fragile stationary growths that apply Sickness[/color]
Gliva.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     apply 5 [color=#60af20]Entangle[/color] to all enemies in a 2 tile range
     summon 2 [color=#20af20]Briarfolk[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Briarfolk are human-shaped vines that entangle enemies[/color]

BloodDrinker.title: BloodDrinker
BloodDrinker.Name: [color=#ff1010]Blood-drinker[/color]
BloodDrinker.Description:
Add [color=#50ff50]+100%[/color] to all [color=#50ff50]healing[/color]
[color=#ff5050]-50%[/color] [color=#ffff50]all resistances[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]adjacent attack[/color]:

     deal [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 2% of the target's max Life[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] yourself for 10% of the damage dealt
BloodDrinker.Description_Unit:
[color=#5050ff]+200 Armor[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]adjacent attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]two-handing[/color]:

     deal 500 [color=#af8f50]Slash[/color] damage to the target
     deal 500 [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage to the target

On [color=#ffff50]kill[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 100

Mesmer.title: Mesmer
Mesmer.Name: [color=#ffaf30]Mesmer[/color]
Mesmer.Description:
[color=#ffff50]+3 stacks[/color] of any [color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] applied by you

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] / [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color]: 

     apply 2 [color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] to yourself

[color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] damage is now dealt in a path

Gain [color=#50ffff]+10 Dodge[/color] per stack of [color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] on self
Mesmer.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage:

     deal [color=#af8f50]Pierce[/color] damage to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 5 * WIL[/color]

Mindbreaker.title: Mindbreaker
Mindbreaker.Name: [color=#ffaf30]Mindhunter[/color]
Mindbreaker.Description:
Per point of [color=#c050ff]Willpower[/color]:

     [color=#30ff30]+1 Speed[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage, if [color=#00ff00]unencumbered[/color]:

     200% of the damage is dealt again as [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage to an adjacent enemy

On [color=#ffff50]step[/color]:

     apply [color=#ffaf30]Repulsion[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]Repulsion applied = your Dexterity[/color]
Mindbreaker.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#ffaf30]Psychic[/color] damage:

     deal [color=#af8f50]Pierce[/color] damage to the target

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 5 * WIL[/color]

BloodMage.title: BloodMage
BloodMage.Name: [color=#ff1010]Blood Mage[/color]
BloodMage.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#ff1010]Bleed[/color]:

     deal [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 10% of your max Life[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] / [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] / [color=#ffff50]self-damage[/color]:

     apply 6 [color=#ff1010]Bleed[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range
BloodMage.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color] / [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] / [color=#ffff50]self-damage[/color]:

     apply 3 [color=#ff1010]Bleed[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

Paragon.title: Paragon
Paragon.Name: [color=#40a0ff]Paragon[/color]
Paragon.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     apply 2 [color=#40a0ff]Anoint[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]applying a[/color] [color=#707070]non-harmful, non-transformation[/color] [color=#ffff50]effect to yourself[/color]:

     apply the [color=#ffff50]same effect[/color] to a random ally

[color=#a0a0a0]Applied stacks = current stacks of that effect on you
Paragon.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color] :

     apply 2 [color=#40a0ff]Anoint[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]applying a non-harmful / non-transformation effect to yourself[/color]:

     apply 3 of the [color=#ffff50]same effect[/color] to all allies in a 3 tile range

Gallus.title: Gallus
Gallus.Name: [color=#ffaf20]Gallus[/color]
Gallus.Description:
[color=#ff0000]+50 Encumbrance[/color]

Per point of [color=#ff7050]Strength[/color]:
     
     [color=#ff0000]+10% Encumbrance[/color] [color=#707070]from items[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color] / [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live: 

     deal [color=#dfaf50]Blunt[/color] damage to all units in a 4 tile range equal to your [color=#ff0000]Encumbrance[/color]
Gallus.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Strijela.title: Strijela
Strijela.Name: [color=#70ff40]Strijela[/color]
Strijela.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]equipping a ranged weapon[/color]: 

     it gains "attacks area if Off-hand empty"

On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] attack range [color=#ffff50]greater than 1[/color]: 

     deal [color=#ffff50]damage[/color] in a path to the furthest enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 10 * DEX

Damage type = Main-hand weapon[/color]
Strijela.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

BheithNochti.title: BheithNochti
BheithNochti.Name: [color=#ffaf20]Bheith Nochti[/color]
BheithNochti.Description:
Per [color=#ffff50]empty armor slot[/color]: 
     
     [color=#ffa050]+100 Accuracy[/color]
     [color=#50ffff]+100 Dodge[/color]
     [color=#30ff30]+8 Speed[/color]

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]: 

     permanently upgrade your Main-hand item [color=#ff8030]+20 Hit[/color] 
     [color=#707070](if equipped)[/color]
     [color=#707070]max 1000 base Hit[/color]
     deal [color=#ffff50]damage[/color] to adjacent enemies

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = Main-hand damage type, Main-hand Hit[/color]
BheithNochti.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Aqliyya.title: Aqliyya
Aqliyya.Name: [color=#ffdf80]Aqliyya[/color]
Aqliyya.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 
     
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]adjacent attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]two-handing[/color]:

     perform a [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against 1 enemy at any range

[color=#a0a0a0]Hit damage = 100% of your Main-hand Hit

This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type[/color]
Aqliyya.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Suwag.title: Suwag
Suwag.Name: [color=#ffa080]Suwag[/color]
Suwag.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color]: 
     
     perform 2 [color=#ff8030]extra attacks[/color] against an adjacent enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]adjacent attack[/color]: 

     deal [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] damage in a straight line starting from your position

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 50 * points spent on Blood powers[/color]
Suwag.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Berserker.title: Berserker
Berserker.Name: [color=#ff5020]Berserker[/color]
Berserker.Description:
[color=#00ff00]-2[/color] [color=#ff0000]Inflexibility[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]kill[/color]:

     deal 15 [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] damage to yourself
     repeat with [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] and [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage

[color=#a0a0a0]Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]dealing[/color] [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] / [color=#ff1010]Blood[/color] / [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage to [color=#ffff50]yourself[/color] / [color=#ffff50]adjacent units[/color]:

      apply 2 [color=#ff5020]Berserk[/color] to yourself

Gain [color=#ff8030]+20 Hit[/color] per stack of [color=#ff5020]Berserk[/color] on self
Berserker.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     perform a 100 damage Main-hand [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against 2 enemies in a 5 tile range

On [color=#ffff50]hit[/color]:

     apply 1 [color=#8020a0]Meditate[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#8020a0]Meditate[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage in a path to a random enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]This hit bypasses all defense and triggers on-hit effects[/color]

Windblade.title: Windblade
Windblade.Name: [color=#90c0ff]Windblade[/color]
Windblade.Description:
[color=#ffff50]20%[/color] chance to deal [color=#af8f50]+200% Slash[/color] damage

On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#90c0ff]Windstrike[/color] to self

On [color=#ffff50]step[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] you don't have [color=#90c0ff]Windstrike[/color]:

     apply 1 [color=#90c0ff]Windstrike[/color] to self
Windblade.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Starjumper.title: Starjumper
Starjumper.Name: [color=#8030af]Starjumper[/color]
Starjumper.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color]:

     [color=#a030b0]teleport[/color] to a random tile
     apply 5 [color=#a030b0]Stasis[/color] to yourself

On [color=#a030b0]teleport[/color]:

     deal [color=#a030b0]Astral[/color] damage to all enemies in a 3 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = your Dexterity * Willpower[/color]

[color=#a030b0]Stasis[/color] no longer prevents you from teleporting
Starjumper.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Uhrata.title: Uhrata
Uhrata.Name: [color=#78bca4]Uhrata[/color]
Uhrata.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]killing an adjacent enemy[/color]:

     grant 1 charge to your [color=#78bca4]first prayer[/color]

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live: 

     deal [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to yourself
     repeat with [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] / [color=#5080ff]Ice[/color] / [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] / [color=#ff2020]Blood[/color] damage
     repeat each instance against 1 enemy at any range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 5% of your max Life

Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase[/color]
Uhrata.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color]: 

     apply 3 [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] to yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Gain [color=#20ff20]Speed[/color] equal to the stacks of [color=#dfaf50]Poise[/color] on self

Oozemancer.title: Oozemancer
Oozemancer.Name: [color=#70ff00]Oozemancer[/color]
Oozemancer.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]enemy death[/color] / [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:  

     summon an [color=#70ff00]Ooze[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     allied [color=#70ff00]Oozes[/color] perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] [color=#707070]against an adjacent enemy[/color]

Allied [color=#70ff00]Oozes[/color] gain [color=#af5f50]Revenge[/color][color=#707070]; they perform an extra attack on ally death[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Oozes are writhing elemental masses that smother enemies with sickness and corrosion

Total summons limited by your Willpower[/color]
Oozemancer.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]initial attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] the target has [color=#70ff00]Sickness[/color]:  

     perform 3 [color=#ffff50]extra attacks[/color] against the target

On [color=#ffff50]hit[/color]:

     deal 100 [color=#70ff00]Poison[/color] damage to 3 enemies in a 3 tile range

Necromancer.title: Necromancer
Necromancer.Name: [color=#a0a000]Necromancer[/color]
Necromancer.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     summon 2 [color=#a0a000]Skeleton Warriors[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]an ally being killed by an enemy[/color]:

     perform a [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against the killer

[color=#a0a0a0]Hit damage = 20 * # of Allies

This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type

Skeleton warriors are armored undead that fight with curved slashing blades

Total summons limited by your Willpower[/color]
Necromancer.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]:

     apply 20 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

Liturgist.title: Liturgist
Liturgist.Name: [color=#8050f0]Liturgist[/color]
Liturgist.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     grant 1 charge to each known [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

     allied [color=#8050f0]Priests[/color] gain [color=#20ff20]+5 Speed[/color] and [color=#ff8030]+100 Hit[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]summoning a[/color] [color=#8050f0]Priest[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] enemies live:

     summon a [color=#c0c060]Worshipper[/color] [color=#c050ff]familiar[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Worshippers are enthused servants that deal astral damage to themselves

Summoned Familiars are not limited by your Willpower[/color]
Liturgist.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]:

     apply 20 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

Elementalist.title: Elementalist
Elementalist.Name: [color=#b080ff]Elementalist[/color]
Elementalist.Description:
Your [color=#ffa050]Accuracy[/color] and [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] [color=#707070]from attacks[/color] is limited to [color=#ff5050]20[/color]

Deal [color=#b080ff]+10% non-Physical[/color] damage per point of [color=#c050ff]Willpower[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]"Physical" damage is Slash, Blunt and Pierce[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], per [color=#ffff50]kinesis[/color] power:

     perform a [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against the target

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color], per [color=#ffff50]kinesis[/color] power:

     perform a [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against 1 enemy in a 4 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Hit damage = 20 * points spent on 'kinesis' powers

This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type[/color]
Elementalist.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]:

     apply 20 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

Torturer.title: Torturer
Torturer.Name: [color=#ff5090]Torturer[/color]
Torturer.Description:
[color=#c050ff]Willpower[/color] no longer removes [color=#ff5050]harmful[/color] effects from you

On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     apply 2 [color=#ff70b0]Agony[/color] to yourself

On [color=#ffff50]applying a[/color] [color=#ff5050]harmful[/color] [color=#ffff50]effect to yourself[/color]:

     apply the [color=#ffff50]same effect[/color] to 1 enemy at any range

[color=#a0a0a0]Applied stacks = current stacks of that effect on you
Torturer.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]:

     apply 20 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

Beastmaster.title: Beastmaster
Beastmaster.Name: [color=#00af40]Beastmaster[/color]
Beastmaster.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

     summon a [color=#00af40]powerful beast[/color] [color=#707070]depending on your highest-level beast familiar, Life / Hit multiplied by Glory / 5[/color]
     [color=#af7020]Brass Dragon[/color] [color=#707070]Red Dragon[/color]
     [color=#50ff80]Quartz Tortoise[/color] [color=#707070]Grika[/color]
     [color=#9050cf]Garnet Spider[/color] [color=#707070]Tsuchigumo[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Summoned Familiars are not limited by your Willpower[/color]
Beastmaster.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color]:

     apply 20 [color=#a0a000]Doom[/color] to all enemies in a 3 tile range

Shapeshifter.title: Shapeshifter
Shapeshifter.Name: [color=#50ff50]Shapeshifter[/color]
Shapeshifter.Description:
[color=#ffff50]+1 stacks[/color] of any [color=#ffff50]"transformation" effect[/color] applied by you

On [color=#ffff50]step[/color] / [color=#ff8030]attack[/color]:

     apply 2 [color=#50ff50]Wildform[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]When applied, this effect replaces and inherits the stacks of any current transformation[/color]
Shapeshifter.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]applying a "transform" effect[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5

On [color=#ffff50]applying a new "transform" effect[/color]:

     deal 1000 damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage type = your Main-hand weapon[/color]

LizardLord.title: LizardLord
LizardLord.Name: [color=#40a000]Arch-Lizard[/color]
LizardLord.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color] / [color=#ffff50]game turn[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]head armor[/color] is equipped and all other armor slots are empty:

     apply 2 [color=#40a000]Lizardform[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]When applied, this effect replaces and inherits the stacks of any current transformation[/color]
LizardLord.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]applying a "transform" effect[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5

On [color=#ffff50]applying a new "transform" effect[/color]:

     deal 1000 damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage type = your Main-hand weapon[/color]

UrBeast.title: UrBeast
UrBeast.Name: [color=#a07040]Ur-Beast[/color]
UrBeast.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#ff5020]Berserk[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]head armor[/color] is equipped and all other armor slots are empty:

     apply 1 [color=#a07040]Beastform[/color] to yourself

[color=#a0a0a0]When applied, this effect replaces and inherits the stacks of any current transformation[/color]
UrBeast.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]applying a "transform" effect[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5

On [color=#ffff50]applying a new "transform" effect[/color]:

     deal 1000 damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage type = your Main-hand weapon[/color]

NightCrow.title: NightCrow
NightCrow.Name: [color=#7050a0]Night-Crow[/color]
NightCrow.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]kill[/color] / [color=#ffff50]apply[/color] [color=#8020a0]Meditate[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]head armor[/color] is equipped and all other armor slots are empty:

     apply 2 [color=#7050a0]Crowform[/color] to yourself
     deal 15 [color=#8030af]Astral[/color] damage to yourself
     deal [color=#a0a000]Death[/color] damage to the closest enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = stacks of Crowform on self * 5

Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase

When applied, this effect replaces and inherits the stacks of any current transformation[/color]
NightCrow.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]applying a "transform" effect[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5

On [color=#ffff50]applying a new "transform" effect[/color]:

     deal 1000 damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage type = your Main-hand weapon[/color]

Anroth.title: Anroth
Anroth.Name: [color=#309fbf]Anroth[/color]
Anroth.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]learn[/color]:

     Doubles your [color=#ff7050]Strength[/color], [color=#50ff70]Dexterity[/color] and [color=#c050ff]Willpower[/color]
     spends [color=#ff5050]10[/color] [color=#707070]unused power points[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]Glory rising[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] you have [color=#ff5050]no powers[/color]:

     permanently upgrade your equipped weapons [color=#ff8030]+100 Hit[/color] / [color=#5050ff]+100 Block[/color]
     [color=#a0a0a0][color=#50ff50]heal[/color] to full life[/color]
     [color=#ff5050]remove[/color] all [color=#ff5050]externally-applied[/color] Effects from yourself
Anroth.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]applying a "transform" effect[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5

On [color=#ffff50]applying a new "transform" effect[/color]:

     deal 1000 damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage type = your Main-hand weapon[/color]

Ogham.title: Ogham
Ogham.Name: [color=#ff5020]Ogham[/color]
Ogham.Description:
You may no longer [color=#78bca4]use prayers[/color] or receive [color=#78bca4]divine intervention[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]initial attack[/color]:

     recite a [color=#78bca4]random prayer[/color]
     [color=#707070]this may recite prayers with 0 charges[/color]
Ogham.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]applying a "transform" effect[/color]:

     [color=#50ff50]heal[/color] 5

On [color=#ffff50]applying a new "transform" effect[/color]:

     deal 1000 damage to all units in a 2 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage type = your Main-hand weapon[/color]

Struggler.title: Struggler
Struggler.Name: [color=#a02020]Struggler[/color]
Struggler.Description:
Fearsome [color=#af40af]Pretas[/color] will hunt you[color=#707070], hungry ghosts from the land of dust...[/color]

33% chance to [color=#ff7030]endure[/color] any amount of damage [color=#707070]endured damage is set to 1, works on self-damage[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]being damaged by an enemy[/color]:

     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]
Struggler.Description_Unit:

On [color=#ffff50]applying a new "transform" effect[/color]:

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage type = your Main-hand weapon[/color]

Arjana.title: Arjana

On [color=#ff8030]hit[/color]:

     apply 1 [color=#ffa070]Blind[/color] to the target

Alhaja.title: Alhaja

Alhaja.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

[color=#a0a0a0]Hit damage = your Main-hand Hit

This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type[/color]
Alhaja.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

Damage = Main-hand Hit, Main-hand damage type

Morlock.title: Morlock

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 20% of your max Life

Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase

Sacred Skins are crawling sheets of flesh that rend enemies and inherit 20% of your life

Summoned Familiars are not limited by your Willpower[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

On [color=#ffff50]picking up leg armor[/color]:

Total [color=#ff0000]Encumbrance[/color] limited to 30

     deal [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage in a path to 2 enemies

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 5 * your Speed[/color]

Nartaka.title: Nartaka
Nartaka.Name: [color=#2050ff]Nartaka[/color]
Nartaka.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color] / [color=#ff8030]hit[/color]:

     deal [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage to 1 enemy in a 4 tile range

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = your Dexterity * Willpower[/color]
Nartaka.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage in a path to 2 enemies

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 5 * your Speed[/color]

Unataak.title: Unataak
Unataak.Name: [color=#d0d080]Unataak[/color]
Unataak.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     [color=#ff5050]remove[/color] a random [color=#ff5050]externally-applied[/color] Effect from yourself
     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy
     repeat these actions for each [color=#ffff50]bare fist[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]
Unataak.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color]:

     deal [color=#0060ff]Lightning[/color] damage in a path to 2 enemies

[color=#a0a0a0]Damage = 5 * your Speed[/color]

Priest.title: Priest
Priest.Name: [color=#ff5030]Priest[/color]
Priest.Description:
Apply [color=#ffff50]+50% stacks[/color] of all [color=#9060a0]Effects[/color] [color=#707070]max +100[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]"Effects" are temporary conditions such as Sickness, Poise, etc[/color]
Priest.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]applying an effect[/color]:

      [color=#ffff50]increase[/color] its stacks by 50%

"Effects" are temporary conditions such as Sickness, Poise, etc[/color]

Mubarizun.title: Mubarizun
Mubarizun.Name: [color=#f0a030]Mubarizun[/color]
Mubarizun.Description:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color]:

     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]

On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] [color=#50ffff]single-handing[/color]:

      perform a 10 damage [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against an adjacent enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type[/color]
Mubarizun.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]step[/color] / [color=#ffff50]block[/color] / [color=#ffff50]dodge[/color]:

     perform an [color=#ff8030]extra attack[/color] against an adjacent enemy

Nihang.title: Nihang
Nihang.Name: [color=#a08080]Abdi[/color]
Nihang.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color], per fully-charged [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

     perform a 100 damage [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against the target

[color=#a0a0a0]This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type[/color]

On [color=#ffff50]Glory rising[/color]:

     permanently upgrade your Main-hand item [color=#ff8030]+20 Hit[/color] [color=#707070]upgrades Off-hand item if no Main-hand equipped[/color]
Nihang.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]attack[/color], for each fully-charged [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

     perform a 100 damage [color=#ff8030]Hit[/color] against the target

[color=#a0a0a0]This hit bypasses all defense and uses your Main-hand damage type[/color]

Warlock.title: Warlock
Warlock.Name: [color=#7020a0]Warlock[/color]
Warlock.Description:
[color=#ffff50]+2 stacks[/color] of any [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] applied by you

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color] / [color=#ffff50]ally death[/color]:

     apply 3 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself
     deal 100 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to the closest enemy
Warlock.Description_Unit:
On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color] / [color=#ffff50]ally death[/color]:

     apply 3 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself
     deal 100 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to the closest enemy

AssassinClass.Description:
[color=#ffff50]20%[/color] chance to deal [color=#af8f50]+200% Physical[/color] damage

[color=#a0a0a0]"Physical" damage is Slash, Blunt and Pierce[/color]

Per point of [color=#50ff70]Dexterity[/color]:

On [color=#ffff50]entrance[/color]:

[color=#a0a0a0]Amount = 1 + (Glory / 5)

Nomads are brown-robed fighters that hurl bronze pilums[/color]

Apostle.title: Apostle
Apostle.Name: [color=#3060ff]Apostle[/color]
Apostle.Description:
On [color=#ff8030]attack[/color] / [color=#ffff50]stand still[/color], [color=#ff5050]if[/color] enemies live:

[color=#a0a0a0]Self-damage is unaffected by resistance / increase[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Divine intervention occurs when your deity saves you from death; must have at least one fully-charged prayer[/color]
Apostle.Description_Unit:
On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color] / [color=#ffff50]ally death[/color]:

     apply 3 [color=#ff7000]Inflame[/color] to yourself
     deal 100 [color=#ff7000]Fire[/color] damage to the closest enemy

On [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color] / [color=#ff8030]initial attack[/color], [color=#ff8080]if[/color] [color=#ffff50]two-handing[/color], per [color=#ffff50]empty armor slot[/color]:

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]
Taugh.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color], per [color=#ffff50]empty armor slot[/color]:

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Mark applied = your attack range[/color]
Peltast.Description_Unit:
On [color=#ffff50]shrug off[/color], per [color=#ffff50]empty armor slot[/color]:

[color=#a0a0a0]Extra attacks use your Main-hand weapon and do not count as an "initial attack"[/color]

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]: 
    
      apply 3 [color=#90c0ff]Gust[/color] to yourself

On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

Damage = Main-hand Hit, Main-hand damage type

[color=#ffff50]+25%[/color] [color=#c0c0c0]chance to block[/color]

[color=#a0a0a0]Gilded Dead are sacred undead warriors. They inherit your Armor and Block
